1746300.name: Remy Raccoon and the Lost Temple Demo
1746300.description:
This demo allows you to enjoy the first 3 levels of Remy Raccoon's perilous journey through the Lost Temple. The full game contains over 100 levels filled with fiendish traps and malevolent creatures. Only the bravest adventurer will collect all the gems and progress to the next level.

Game modes

  • Play in Adventure Mode to unlock new levels.
  • Face an unpredictable set of challenges in Random Mode.
  • Replay some of your favourite levels as endurance challenges in Survival Mode.

Complete bonus challenges along the way to unlock idols. Complete all the idol challenges to unlock the legendary Idol of Dominion.

Your adventure awaits...
